/usr/bin/ar qc libouster_client.a CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/sensor_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/lidar_scan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/compat_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/field.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/profile_extension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/metadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/open_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/scan_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/scan_source_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/io_type.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/multi_scan_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/transform_quaternion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/transform_vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/transform_homogeneous.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/pose_util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/pose_conversion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/cloud_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/error_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/zone_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/lidar_scan_set.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/json_tools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/normals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/zip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/chanfield.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/xyzlut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/stl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/zone.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/zrb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/zone_header.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/vector_streambuf.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/sha256.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/beam_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ouster_client.dir/src/typedefs.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libouster_client.a
